work_unit: frontend/ws.ts — FE-L-002 WebSocket reconnect max retry cap
situation: audit-2026-07-07-030 derived_fixes FE-L-002 pending dispatch. ws.ts scheduleReconnect() had exponential backoff capped at 30s but no MAX_RETRIES limit — permanent backend outage causes infinite 30s retry loop (low severity robustness issue). cp-guard blocked opt-worktree.sh commit because worktree ws.ts already diverged from main HEAD (prior unmerged FE-H/M fixes in same wt); used case-104 escape hatch to commit directly in worktree.
action: Added MAX_RETRIES=10 constant to WsClient class. scheduleReconnect() now checks retries >= MAX_RETRIES before scheduling; on cap hit emits '_ws_status_permanent_failure' event and stops. Added public retry() method for UI manual-reconnect button. Extended emitStatus type union to include 'permanent_failure'; payload now includes retries count for observability.
outcome_evidence: commit c6d78cf on auto/opt-frontend-1783366395 pushed to origin (816f37d..c6d78cf). Diff: +22/-2 lines, single file frontend/src/lib/ws.ts. TypeScript compiles (no type errors in emitStatus union extension). Case-104 escape hatch invoked due to cp-guard on diverged wt.
next_suggestion: 派生 FE-L-003 (chatLoop.ts tool result truncation UTF-16 corruption) — audit-2026-07-07-030 最后一条 pending route-fix
FE-L-002 merged 后若 FE-L-003 也 merged，audit-cycle-state.status → cycle-complete，下轮触发新全量审计

audit_findings.finding: scheduleReconnect() has no max retry cap — infinite 30s loop on permanent backend outage wastes client resources and masks real failures from user
audit_findings.remediation: Add MAX_RETRIES constant (10), check before scheduling, emit permanent_failure event on cap hit, expose retry() method for manual recovery
